scripts.dev: npm run build -w @sofi-marqui/domain && concurrently -n api,web -c blue,magenta "npm run dev -w @sofi-marqui/api" "npm run dev -w @sofi-marqui/web"
scripts.dev:e2e: cross-env DATA_FILE=./data/e2e-state.json AUTH_USERNAME=admin AUTH_PASSWORD=admin AUTH_JWT_SECRET=e2e-secret concurrently -n api,web -c blue,magenta "npm run dev -w @sofi-marqui/api" "npm run dev -w @sofi-marqui/web"
scripts.build: npm run build -w @sofi-marqui/domain && npm run build -w @sofi-marqui/web && npm run build -w @sofi-marqui/api
scripts.test: npm run build -w @sofi-marqui/domain && npm run test --workspaces --if-present
scripts.test:coverage: npm run build -w @sofi-marqui/domain && npm run test:coverage --workspaces --if-present
scripts.e2e: npm run build -w @sofi-marqui/domain && start-server-and-test "npm run dev:e2e" "http://localhost:5173|http://localhost:4000/api/health" "cypress run"
scripts.e2e:open: npm run build -w @sofi-marqui/domain && start-server-and-test "npm run dev:e2e" "http://localhost:5173|http://localhost:4000/api/health" "cypress open"
scripts.check: npm run lint && npm run test && npm run build && npm run e2e
